$schema_note: Conceptual operator policy example, not a complete OpenClaw config file. Keep real secrets outside public repos.

openclawNativeReferences.execPolicy: Use OpenClaw tools.exec.* config plus the exec approvals system. See the official OpenClaw approvals documentation.
openclawNativeReferences.models: Use OpenClaw model/provider configuration for real routing. This file only documents operator intent.

exampleModelRoutingNotes.notes: Replace with your own routing policy. Do not publish provider keys, account IDs, or private endpoints.
